name: Go
content:
## Tech Stack: Go

- Use Go modules (`go.mod` / `go.sum`).
- Standard project layout: `cmd/` for binaries, `internal/` for private packages.
- Build: `go build ./...` | Test: `go test ./...` | Vet: `go vet ./...` | Format: `go fmt ./...`
- Prefer `net/http`, `database/sql`, `encoding/json` from stdlib before reaching for external packages.
- Use table-driven tests. Keep test files `_test.go` in the same package.
- Greenfield default: use the latest stable Go version.
